benchmark: hotpotqa_benchmark_v1 (50 bridge questions, HotpotQA distractor validation)
task: HotpotQA 50题评测 + 参数优化到最优

optimization_journey.config: mix k=5 rrf VW=0.3 (原 KG 4611 triples)
mix k=15 weighted VW=0.3 (gleaning KG 7407 triples)

final_optimal.config: mix search_mode, top_k=20, VECTOR_WEIGHT=0.3, FUSION_STRATEGY=weighted, PAGERANK_WEIGHT=0.3, gleaning_steps=1

key_optimization_factors.top_k_5_to_20: Hit Rate +0.16 (最大单因素提升，更多候选=更多命中)
key_optimization_factors.rrf_to_weighted_fusion: MRR +0.04 (weighted 融合保留 KG 精确排序优势)
key_optimization_factors.gleaning_steps_0_to_1: Hit Rate +0.04, MRR +0.05 (恢复5个missing实体题，三元组+60%)
key_optimization_factors.entity_threshold_sweep: 无影响 (子串匹配主导，embedding阈值非瓶颈)
key_optimization_factors.pagerank_weight_sweep: 无影响 (PPR是离散top-10加成，权重不影响)

failure_analysis_final.still_missing_detail: HMAS Narani, Vickers machine gun, Yakuza, Theodore G. Bilbo, Robert Case (gleaning未恢复)
failure_analysis_final.name_normalization_detail: Villa Unión Sinaloa vs Villa Unión; Mexican Indignados Movement vs Mexican; 1991 Perfect Storm vs 1991
failure_analysis_final.bridge_hard_detail: 实体在KG但bridge问题query不含实体名，seed匹配找到泛化词
